concepts: anchored-vwap value hold with directional expansion

next_cycle_focus: Do not spend another cycle refining the current SOL / 1h batch. All three branches failed the walk-forward trade-count requirement with zero trades, so the next exploration turn should rotate toward a different supported lane or a materially more continuous state framework rather than tweaking these SOL intraday concepts.
rationale: Cycle 130 is now closed and explicitly abandoned. All three current-cycle SOL / 1h branches produced zero trades in both insample and out-of-sample walk-forward testing and failed with low-trade-count flags. That means there is no usable within-batch evidence for refinement; the failure is again at the signal-density layer, not at the stop/target or threshold-tuning level.
